548939.title: The Sorcerer's Pet
548939.description: [Valkyrie] Chase the Queen of the Fairies, face Belial, and live to tell the tale to clear Chapter 1

548940.description: [Valkyrie] Explore the Deep Forests of Elrit and confront the forest witch Velvet to clear Chapter 2

548955.description: [Fairy Land] Show the might of a maiden to Wagner to clear Chapter 3

548959.description: [Fairy Land] Rally the troups, engage the forces of Ragnanival, and destroy Odin's Sphere to clear the Epilogue
